agent_trace.summary: [已完成][执行冲突] 任务“计算US Steel FY2024存货周转率”与中枢规划阶段的万户级配额分配职责不符。此任务为单一计算，无法按传统万户级配额和1:10逐级分解的模式进行规划。已将任务视为一个整体的“财务分析”配额，并提供其内部执行步骤作为分解参考，以满足结构化输出要求。

tumen_quota.task: US Steel FY2024 Inventory Turnover Calculation

decomposition_rule.description: 针对单一财务计算任务，将万户级任务分解为千户级（主要步骤）和百户级（详细子步骤），以模拟1:10逐级分解口径。

wanhu_tumen_level.name: US Steel FY2024 Inventory Turnover Calculation
wanhu_tumen_level.target: 计算美国钢铁公司2024财年存货周转率

qianhu_mingghan_level.name: Identify Financial Statements
qianhu_mingghan_level.description: 确定并获取US Steel FY2024的年度财务报表（10-K报告）。

qianhu_mingghan_level.name: Extract Cost of Goods Sold (COGS)
qianhu_mingghan_level.description: 从利润表中提取2024财年的销售成本（COGS）。

qianhu_mingghan_level.name: Extract Inventory Values
qianhu_mingghan_level.description: 从资产负债表中提取2024财年初和年末的存货价值。

qianhu_mingghan_level.name: Calculate Average Inventory
qianhu_mingghan_level.description: 根据期初和期末存货计算平均存货。

qianhu_mingghan_level.name: Calculate Inventory Turnover Ratio
qianhu_mingghan_level.description: 使用COGS和平均存货计算存货周转率。

sub_steps: 1.1. 使用web_search工具搜索“US Steel FY2024 10-K report”。
1.2. 从搜索结果中识别并访问官方SEC文件链接。
1.3. 使用web_fetch或web_execute_js工具获取10-K报告内容。
1.4. 在报告内容中定位“Consolidated Statements of Operations”（利润表）和“Consolidated Balance Sheets”（资产负债表）。

reporting_cycle.condition: 任务完成后立即上报计算结果和所用数据来源。
reporting_cycle.format: JSON格式，包含公司名称、财年、COGS、期初存货、期末存货、平均存货、存货周转率及数据来源URL。

mingghan_allocations.title: Identify FY2024 Financial Reports for US Steel
mingghan_allocations.description: Locate and identify the official financial reports (e.g., 10-K filing) for United States Steel Corporation (X) for Fiscal Year 2024. The output should be the URL or document path to the relevant report.

mingghan_allocations.title: Extract FY2024 Cost of Goods Sold (COGS)
mingghan_allocations.description: From the identified FY2024 financial reports, accurately extract the value for Cost of Goods Sold (COGS). The output should be the COGS numerical value.

mingghan_allocations.title: Extract FY2023 Ending Inventory (FY2024 Beginning Inventory)
mingghan_allocations.description: From the identified financial reports, extract the ending inventory value for Fiscal Year 2023, which will serve as the beginning inventory for FY2024. The output should be the numerical value of FY2023 ending inventory.

mingghan_allocations.title: Extract FY2024 Ending Inventory
mingghan_allocations.description: From the identified FY2024 financial reports, extract the ending inventory value for Fiscal Year 2024. The output should be the numerical value of FY2024 ending inventory.

mingghan_allocations.title: Preliminary Data Verification for COGS
mingghan_allocations.description: Conduct a preliminary check on the extracted FY2024 COGS data to ensure accuracy and consistency. Report any discrepancies or flags for review.

mingghan_allocations.title: Preliminary Data Verification for Beginning Inventory
mingghan_allocations.description: Conduct a preliminary check on the extracted FY2024 Beginning Inventory data (FY2023 Ending Inventory) to ensure accuracy and consistency. Report any discrepancies or flags for review.

mingghan_allocations.title: Preliminary Data Verification for Ending Inventory
mingghan_allocations.description: Conduct a preliminary check on the extracted FY2024 Ending Inventory data to ensure accuracy and consistency. Report any discrepancies or flags for review.

mingghan_allocations.title: Calculate Average Inventory
mingghan_allocations.description: Using the verified Beginning and Ending Inventory values for FY2024, calculate the Average Inventory. The output should be the calculated average inventory.

mingghan_allocations.title: Calculate Inventory Turnover Ratio
mingghan_allocations.description: Using the verified COGS and the calculated Average Inventory for FY2024, compute the Inventory Turnover Ratio. The output should be the final ratio.

mingghan_allocations.title: Prepare Final Result Report
mingghan_allocations.description: Consolidate the calculated Inventory Turnover Ratio and prepare a formatted draft report suitable for submission to higher command. Include all necessary inputs and the final ratio.

risks: The original task is a single calculation, requiring an artificial decomposition into 10 sub-tasks to meet structural requirements. This may lead to over-granularity or redundant efforts at the lower (千户级) levels.
Dependency on the accuracy and availability of US Steel's FY2024 financial reports.

meta.stage_description: 万户级执行并向下分解到千户级。

jaghun_allocations.description: Identify Primary Financial Reporting Source for United States Steel Corporation (X) FY2024 (e.g., SEC 10-K filings).
Locate and define the specific line item for Cost of Goods Sold (COGS) within the identified financial reporting source for FY2024.
Locate and define the specific line item for Inventory at the beginning of FY2024 (i.e., end of FY2023) within the identified financial reporting source.
Locate and define the specific line item for Inventory at the end of FY2024 within the identified financial reporting source.
Develop a data extraction strategy for obtaining the Cost of Goods Sold (COGS) value for FY2024 from the identified source.
Develop a data extraction strategy for obtaining the beginning inventory value for FY2024 from the identified source.
Develop a data extraction strategy for obtaining the ending inventory value for FY2024 from the identified source.
Formulate the precise calculation plan for 'Average Inventory' using the extracted beginning and ending inventory values.
Formulate the precise calculation plan for 'Inventory Turnover Ratio' using the extracted COGS and the calculated average inventory.
Establish data verification criteria and reporting guidelines for the final inventory turnover ratio, including units and rounding.
